[]: Re: How do you think Asuka would react if             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Feb 18, 2023 1:57 pm Probably very similarly as in her 2.0 scene, even if roles are reversed. She would kick Shinji or something.

[]: Re: How do you think Asuka would react if             Quote Post by nerv bae » Tue Feb 28, 2023 12:29 pm Shinjo19 wrote: No, this:

[]: Re: How do you think Asuka would react if             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Tue Feb 28, 2023 5:13 pm Asuka would probably blush at first, then get mad at Shinji's carelessness. I also believe that she would be terrified of Pen² at first, just like Shinji.

[]: Re: How do you think Asuka would react if             Quote Post by MsenjaKagami » Mon Mar 06, 2023 4:12 am Idk if this would really say anything since it's not exactly "canon" so to speak, but a similar scenario (or at least part of it) does play out in the AU sequence in Ep 26 so that could be an indication as to how Asuka might react to that.
